summary: Comprehensive testing of NEW features for Grade 5 Scholarship Exam Platform - Iteration 5. All new features working: Bulk CSV student import, Marker bank details management, Admin Payments tab. Backend: 100% pass (15/15 tests). Frontend: 100% pass (all UI elements verified).
passed_tests: API Health Check - Version 2.0.0 operational
Admin Login (admin@exam.lk/admin123) - SUCCESS
Marker Login (marker@exam.lk/marker123) - SUCCESS
Admin statistics API returns all 8 required fields
GET /api/marker/bank-details - returns bank details
PUT /api/marker/bank-details - saves bank details (Sampath Bank - Kandy - 9876543210)
GET /api/marker/my-payments - returns payments with totals
GET /api/admin/marker-payments - returns grouped marker payment data
POST /api/admin/pay-marker/{marker_id} - processes marker payments
POST /api/admin/import-students-csv - creates student+parent accounts from CSV
CSV import skips existing emails correctly
CSV import requires admin authentication
Admin user list includes school field
POST /api/batches/create accepts teacher_incharge field
GET /api/batches returns batches with teacher_incharge
Admin Dashboard shows 5 tabs (Overview, User Management, Batches, Payments, Teaching)
Admin Overview tab shows 8 stat cards (Students:12, Parents:9, Markers:3, Exams:11, Batches:9, Attempts:4, Pending Marking:0, Completed:1)
Admin Overview shows 5 Quick Action buttons (Add User, CSV Import, Create Batch, Marker Payments, Desktop App)
CSV Import modal opens from Quick Actions with format instructions
Admin Payments tab shows marker payments with bank details (Sampath Bank - Kandy - 9876543210 - Paper Marker)
Admin User Management tab shows School column
Admin Batches tab shows batch cards with Teacher: field (Mrs. Perera, Mrs. Test, etc.)
Marker Dashboard shows 3 tabs (Pending Papers, My Payments, Bank Details)
Marker Bank Details tab shows saved bank info (Sampath Bank, Kandy, 9876543210)
Marker My Payments tab shows summary cards (Papers Marked:1, Pending:Rs.0, Total Paid:Rs.50)
seed_data_creation: Created test students via CSV import during testing, bank details saved for marker
context_for_next_testing_agent: All NEW features verified: 1) CSV import creates student+parent accounts from CSV file with auto-generated passwords, 2) Marker bank details saved and displayed (Sampath Bank - Kandy - 9876543210), 3) Admin Payments tab shows marker payment summaries with bank info, 4) Admin Dashboard has 5 tabs (was 4 in previous iteration), 5) Batch cards show teacher_incharge field. Sri Lankan bank dropdown in Marker Bank Details form includes: Bank of Ceylon, People's Bank, Commercial Bank, HNB, Sampath Bank, NSB, Seylan Bank, DFCC, NDB, Pan Asia, Union Bank, Amana Bank.
